Flu.name: Influenza
Flu.description: Viral respiratory infection causing fever, cough, headache, fatigue.

Dengue.name: Dengue Fever
Dengue.description: Mosquito-borne viral infection with high fever, severe headache, joint pain, nausea.
Dengue.when_to_see_doctor: Severe abdominal pain, persistent vomiting, bleeding

Diabetes.name: Diabetes
Diabetes.description: Chronic condition with high blood sugar, thirst, frequent urination, fatigue.
